actionCalls.description: This will send the welcome email to the candidate
actionCalls.name: Send_Welcome_email
actionCalls.label: Send Welcome email

fields.name: Interview_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Interview

Thank you that's all the information we require for now, as a final stage we need to verify the information you have submitted.


Once you have booked your PORTW interview why not use the app to find work by navigating to the home page and selecting find work, the same can be done on the candidate portal too.


This verification will be done using an online video call which can be arranged below:

fields.name: Inteview_Text_002
fields.fieldText:
Interview

Thank you that's all the information we require for now, as a final stage we need to verify the information you have submitted.


Once you have booked your PORTW interview why not use the app to find work by navigating to the home page and selecting find work, the same can be done on the candidate portal too.


This verification will be done using an online video call which can be arranged below:

value.stringValue: Click here to arrange your interview!

fields.name: Interview_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Interview

Thank you that's all the information we require for now, as a final stage we need to verify the information you have submitted.


This verification will be done using an online video call which can be arranged below:

fields.name: Branch_Picker
fields.fieldText: Please choose the Blue Arrow branch you want to interview with

fields.name: Interview_Text_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Interview

Thank you that's all the information we require for now, as a final stage we need to verify the information you have submitted.


Please visit us onsite from 4th September. DON'T FORGET: Bring your proof of right to work documentation with you!

fields.name: Interview_Text_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Interview

Thank you that's all the information we require for now, the next step is to arrange an online video call.


Please note that our interview booking system is having a planned upgrade at the moment. We expect to resume normal service from 2pm on Monday 9th October.


We are really sorry to be holding you up today! Please come back on Monday after 2pm to book your video call.

textTemplates.name: AppGraphics
